source.description: Global Fire Atlas derived from MODIS/VIIRS satellite active fire detections. Tracks individual fire events worldwide with daily progression, burned area, and duration data.

datasets.by_year_enriched/fires_YYYY_enriched.par: Primary fire event records with location, burned area, duration, and land cover
datasets.fire_progression_YYYY.parquet: Daily progression data for animations - linked to events via event_id

metrics.duration_days: Duration of fire event in days
metrics.day_num: Day number within fire event progression
metrics.land_cover: Dominant land cover type at fire location

geographic_context.coverage: Global - all continents with fire activity
geographic_context.focus: Satellite-detected fire events from MODIS/VIIRS sensors
admin_levels: Point locations with burned area perimeters

data_quality_notes: Small fires may not be detected by satellite sensors
Fire perimeters derived from active fire detections, not ground surveys
Daily progression shows fire spread over time
Some fires may be split into multiple events if separated by gaps
